channel.title: Zeitschrift für Physikalische Chemie
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Zeitschrift für Physikalische Chemie

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Fahim Ullah, Adnan Khan, Kashif Gul, Abdullah M. Asiri, Tahseen Kamal, Nauman Ali DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2024-frontmatter12

item.title: Gamma radiation-induced degradation of Acid Violet 49 in the presence of hydrogen peroxide (H2O2) in an aqueous medium
item.description: Article by Fahim Ullah, Adnan Khan, Kashif Gul, Abdullah M. Asiri, Tahseen Kamal, Nauman Ali DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2022-0165

item.title: Oxygen doped g-C3N4/LDH composite as highly efficient photocatalyst for wastewater treatment
item.description: Article by Fahim Ullah, Adnan Khan, Kashif Gul, Abdullah M. Asiri, Tahseen Kamal, Nauman Ali DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2023-0468

item.title: Facile synthesis of lanthanum carbonate octahydrate and lanthanum oxide nanoparticles by sonochemical method: systematic characterizations
item.description: Article by Fahim Ullah, Adnan Khan, Kashif Gul, Abdullah M. Asiri, Tahseen Kamal, Nauman Ali DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2023-0396

item.title: Numerical study on the temperature dependence of soot formation in acetylene pyrolysis blended with methane, formaldehyde, methanol, and dimethyl ether
item.description: Article by Fahim Ullah, Adnan Khan, Kashif Gul, Abdullah M. Asiri, Tahseen Kamal, Nauman Ali DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2023-0283

item.title: The role of greenhouse gases in radiative equilibrium – Thermodynamic evaluation
item.description: Article by Fahim Ullah, Adnan Khan, Kashif Gul, Abdullah M. Asiri, Tahseen Kamal, Nauman Ali DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2023-0384

item.title: Ab initio study of surfaces of lead and tin based metal halide perovskite structures
item.description: Article by Fahim Ullah, Adnan Khan, Kashif Gul, Abdullah M. Asiri, Tahseen Kamal, Nauman Ali DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2024-0616

item.title: Experimental study of heat pipes for battery cooling technology in EVs
item.description: Article by Fahim Ullah, Adnan Khan, Kashif Gul, Abdullah M. Asiri, Tahseen Kamal, Nauman Ali DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2023-0502

item.title: Cellulose acetate sheet supported gold nanoparticles for the catalytic reduction of toxic organic pollutants
item.description: Article by Fahim Ullah, Adnan Khan, Kashif Gul, Abdullah M. Asiri, Tahseen Kamal, Nauman Ali DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2023-0420
